---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want.

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the preferred behavior, UI, API, or automation change.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any fallback or simpler alternatives you considered.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear user-visible outcome
- [ ] Clear success condition
- [ ] Known regression risk identified

## Additional Context

Include example commands, screenshots, or workflow notes if useful.
